blockReason: no active token plan - requires Max plan for music-2.6

tracks.title: MeshFire
tracks.theme: Decentralized P2P mesh networks, privacy, freedom
tracks.musicPrompt: Ethereal electronic cyberpunk ambient with pulsing synth pads and distant arpeggios, evoking a hidden mesh network transmitting freedom.
tracks.videoPrompt: Dark cyberpunk cityscape with glowing mesh-node particles forming a constellation, neon data streams, slow camera drift through tunnels
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Static hum, nodes awake
Signals pulse through the dark

[Verse]
No tower owns the sky tonight
We route around the light
Peer to peer, heartbeat to heartbeat
Secrets pass without a trace

[Chorus]
MeshFire burning under concrete
Every node a fist of freedom
Relay the truth where wires sleep
We are the signal

[Outro]
Fade to static, but never die
The mesh remembers

tracks.title: CryptoNight
tracks.theme: Monero mining, dark pools, digital gold
tracks.musicPrompt: Dark electronic industrial track with heavy sub-bass and metallic percussion, evoking underground mining rigs and untraceable digital gold.
tracks.videoPrompt: Industrial server room filled with GPU rigs, green and amber LEDs flashing rhythmically, steam rising, slow tracking shot past cooling fans
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Fans spin low, hash rates climb

[Verse]
Poolside shadows trade in rings
ASIC heat, the night begins
Every block a buried mine
Untraceable by design

[Chorus]
CryptoNight, the ledger hides
Digital gold beneath the tides
No eyes to trace, no name to own
Mining freedom, all alone

[Bridge]
Hash to hash, the chain grows long
In darkness we are strong

[Outro]
Wallet locked, we disappear
Until the next moon

tracks.title: ZeroClaw
tracks.musicPrompt: Upbeat driving synthwave electronic with urgent pulsing bass and bright arpeggios, evoking a caffeine-fueled last-hours hackathon sprint.
tracks.videoPrompt: Split-screen coding montage: terminal window, IDE with colorful syntax, team huddled over laptops, countdown timer to deadline, high energy cuts
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Clock ticks toward the wire

[Verse]
Red bull cans and terminal glare
One last commit in the air
Stack overflow at 3 AM
Shipping code with caffeine again

[Chorus]
ZeroClaw, we ship tonight
Build it fast, make it right
Demo gods, hear our prayer
We deploy without a care

[Bridge]
Bugs are features, time is myth
Push to main, we go with

[Outro]
Deadline crushed, the site is live
ZeroClaw survives
